source: oracles/uapki/library/uapkic/src/dstu7564.c dstu7564_self_test_kmac (K384/M/KMAC384) - dual-oracle cross-checked byte-for-byte against oracles/bouncycastle-java/.../DSTU7564Test.java macTests() test2, an independent Java implementation (DSTU7564Mac.java), not just a second reading of the same C source. Both cite DSTU 7564:2014 as the source standard; neither is the primary standard text itself - see DECISIONS.md D-44. This is the only one of the three cases that exercises truncation from the 1024-bit internal state to a size (384 bits) smaller than the standalone Kupyna-512 hash's own 512-bit output - the discriminating case for a tail-vs-head truncation bug.
